title: Eager Beavers
description: Adds Beavers! Beavers can chop down trees, build dams & more!
body:
# 🌲 Eager Beavers 🌲

Ever wanted beavers in Minecraft? Well here they are!

**Special 1.3 update!** Spawning issues should now be fixed along with beavers eating too much of the world!

For issues, suggestions, or feedback, feel free to contact me on discord, my username is **sqwigly_**


![BEAVERS](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/QNh0xawR/images/c62a8a8ebb2b1baa07352cdbc5b7ef2a5263858a.png)

## Features:

### 🛠️ Tree Chopping:
- If mobGriefing is enabled, beavers will chop down nearby trees
- Trees will fall to the ground, leaving stumps behind

### 🎒 Item Collection:
- Beavers will pick up logs they bite down, as well as food, saplings (which they replant), and sticks (which they eat)
- Give a beaver food and it will eat it after a short while

### 🌊 Dam Building:
- After gathering logs (or picking up any other blocks!), Beavers will seek out the nearest source of water and begin to dam

### Other:
- Can be bred with logs/wood
- can be tamed with sticks
- Drops Beaver Pelts
- Craft a Beaver Pelt into a Beaver Hat, which lets you swim fast underwater!

## Requirements:
Uses Geckolib
